package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationInvariantParseInsideHandler() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_invariant_parse_inside_handler"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag handlers that parse invariant templates, schemas, or expressions per request."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
